title: Synapusyu THE MOVIE: Pushu Hoppe Nyuu World
titleRomaji: Synapusyu THE MOVIE: Pushu Hoppe Nyuu World
titleNative: シナぷしゅ THE MOVIE ぷしゅほっぺにゅうワールド
synonyms: Synapusyu The Movie: Push Hoppe New World
synopsis: In front of main character Pushu Pushu, who lives in planet Pushu Pushu, a cute fairy appears when Pushu Pushu cleans his mouth with a napkin. As he appears, "Nyuu" has lost a cheek, and Pushu Pushu, encouraged by Nyuu, boards a rocket and goes searching for it. The two go meeting friends in the various stars they find in their trek.

hashtag: #シナぷしゅ #映画シナぷしゅみたよ

title: Man Huang Xian Jie
synopsis: In the vast and wild fairyland, the culture of cultivating immortals prevails, and mortals are proud to become cultivators. College student, Lu Hangzhi, transmigrated from the modern times and became a mortal servant in Ziyun Town. He lived a life of treading on thin ice every day, but he refused to accept his fate and worked hard to get rid of his status quo and strived to get ahead. Later, because of a good deed, he was appreciated by Zhu Fuqin, the eldest lady of the Zhu Mansion, and his senior brother Leng Wuya. With unremitting efforts, he passed many tests and joined the Xuanxin Sect. He was promoted from an outer disciple to an inner disciple, and was even favored by the deputy head Chen Ji and took him in. He cut his way through obstacles and moved forward on the road of cultivating immortals.

title: Crowned in a Hundred Days
synopsis: One second the restaurant was filled with joy, the next it was a river of blood… The king, who clearly loved his people, suddenly became a bloodthirsty beast… "Ming" has lost everyone he cared about; this terrible king is truly awful! I will take my revenge! Wait, you mean the soul in front of me with only 100 days left to live is the real "Lie"? Alright, alright! 100 days—let's both be crowned kings together! (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Milky Ways
synopsis: A woman pours milk from the top of the mountain. At the foot of the mountain a man milks and pours it into a tank. One evening his pigeon doesn’t come back as usual, and finally it brings back small miracle from a woman. 1st year work 2016 my Yano Honami, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Sylvanian Families: The Movie - A Gift from Freya
titleRomaji: Sylvanian Families: Freya kara no Okurimono
titleEnglish: Sylvanian Families: The Movie - A Gift from Freya
titleNative: 劇場版 シルバニアファミリー フレアからのおくりもの
synonyms: Sylvanian Families: La película: El regalo de Freya
Sylvanian Families Filmen: Den Stora Gåvojakten
Sylvanian Families Filmen: Den Store Gavejakten
Sylvanian Families Filmen: Den store gavejagt
synopsis: The annual Star Festival arrives in Sylvanian Village again this year. While everyone is eagerly looking forward to it, Chocolate Rabbit girl Freya is worried. It's her mother's birthday on the day of the festival, and she can't think of a gift at all. Furthermore, Freya is appointed to the important role of preparing the festival's main event, the 'Tree of the Year.' So, what will Freya come up with to make her mother and her friends happy? (Source: Apple TV)

title: Huangdi Bixia de Tianjia Baobei
synopsis: Little Princess, who has become a king? Is the world patriarchal? The minister can execute the grand princess of a country at will? So, in order to survive, she can only please the king and the naughty brother? No, Babyqueen is not willing! Not only does she not want to please these men, she also wants to compete for the throne as a queen! And in the presence of thousands of ministers scolded her king father as shit! Strangely, after the scolding, everyone seems to be looking at me!

title: Sword and Fairy 4
synopsis: For the sake of their cultivation endeavors, the Qionghua Sect sent its elders to forge two swords, Wangshu and Xihe, and sought two disciples to wield them in dual cultivation, attempting to bind the demon realm and seize its immense spiritual power. This ultimately triggered a great war between humans and demons, resulting in heavy casualties on both sides. During this time, Su Yu, the host of Wangshu, disagreed with the Qionghua Sect's cultivation philosophy and left the sect with Yun Tianqing. The demon realm seized the opportunity to escape, and the Qionghua Sect's leader perished in the war. The two married on Qingluan Peak and had a son, Yun Tianhe. They both died young due to the icy cold that invaded their bodies. Young Yun Tianhe grew up alone on Qingluan Mountain. He was unaware of his parents' past, and the unexpected arrival of Han Lingsha set the wheels of fate turning once more. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: RED FOREST
synopsis: Amii runs and runs on a bloodstained earth, through dark forests and warm fields. She keeps running in fear. Graduate Work 2016 by Yikun Wang, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)
